{{Relic Infobox|Wongo's Mystery Ticket|2}}{{R|Wongo's Mystery Ticket||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Welcome to Wongo's|2}} event.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from {{E|Welcome to Wongo's|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Wongo's Mystery Box}} option.
